title: My view of Lilith
wikitext:
[]: My view of Lilith             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Oct 07, 2008 2:17 pm Summed up, this is what I believe Lilith would look like if she did decide to return.... http://i34.tinypic.com/zly8ns.jpg Wouldn't you agree?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Oct 07, 2008 2:39 pm Yeah, I've seen that before, and yes, that could be a way that she could come back. But....... She got spit at the neck and her head came apart, so...maybe not.....

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Tue Oct 07, 2008 2:51 pm I think what he means is the emergence of Lilith during 3I, before she got her head "cut" off.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 07, 2008 2:52 pm Lilith? That looks more like Eve (as realized in the Eden Project)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Oct 07, 2008 3:02 pm Well, he said "return," so I assumed that is was post 3I due to the female figure being covered in earth and earthy things, like she had been part of the earth for a long lime. And as you can see, there is snow and ice in the pic, which would indicate the return of an environmental equilibrium, as apposed to the constant summer tamps of pre- and during 3I. Ok, I dug way too far into this.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Oct 07, 2008 3:29 pm Action Bastard <3 Its good to dig! But I mean if say...One day Lilith awoke in real life..I mean if she was real and all that. I believe that's what she would look like. ps..Ya, I'm posting again.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Tue Oct 07, 2008 3:31 pm That is the most beautiful image I have ever laid eyes upon. Wouldnt Lillith be Bigger?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Oct 07, 2008 3:41 pm Lilith can be any size you want her to be...I mean look at 02 in EOE ^__^ Silly Anno. I do hope something like this happens..Would make life interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Oct 11, 2008 9:00 pm Yes it would. Nice pic.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Wed Oct 15, 2008 8:34 pm AyrYntake wrote: I think what he means is the emergence of Lilith during 3I, before she got her head "cut" off.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 16, 2008 10:27 am Friend, I'm saying that -this is my view of what Lilith would look like IF she was real in our world- Not the Eva story line. I mean if one day Lilith awoke in our world, this is how I feel she would look.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Thu Oct 16, 2008 11:59 am Anyway, it's quite a beautiful picture, and in my humble opinion, I believe that Lilith would have to rise from a absolutely remote location, either somewhere uninhabitable or hidden away, like the picture depicts. (No human life)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 16, 2008 12:52 pm Dramamine wrote: In this instance, I recieved four of the exact same messages pertaining to Mr. Otaku's retort. Anywho, no back-handing was intended in my lil' rant, do forgive me Sailor Star Dust, no harm was wished.
